page_content:
Formerly: BULM758X.

BULM711 Data Driven Decision Making II (2 Credits)

Analytical modeling of business decisions; uncertainty, risk and expected utility; regression modeling to infer relationships among variables. Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program; or permission of BMGT-Robert H. Smith School of Business.

Credit Only Granted for. BUSI630, BULM758Y or BULM711.
